title: L'Atelier de Joël Robuchon
description: Uma experiência sensorial única que redefine o conceito de alta gastronomia, escolhido pela sua maestria técnica e ambiente intimista.
img_alt: A meticulously plated gourmet dessert in a high-end Michelin-starred Parisian restaurant. The lighting is soft and directional, highlighting the textures of the food against a dark, moody background. Elegant tableware is partially visible in the blurred foreground. The aesthetic is extremely refined, focusing on culinary artistry and luxury dining. Warm, inviting tones dominate the composition.

title: Les Suites
description: Selecionamos este endereço pela exclusividade absoluta e pelo serviço de haute couture personalizado que representa o ápice do luxo parisiense.
img_alt: A stunning, brightly lit interior of a luxury boutique in Paris, showcasing elegant handbags on pristine glass shelves. The space features classic Haussmannian architectural details like high ceilings and ornate moldings, combined with modern minimalist display units. The light mode aesthetic is clean, bright, and airy. The color palette revolves around whites, creams, and the warm leather tones of the products.

title: Passage des Panoramas
description: Um mergulho na história de Paris; escolhido por preservar o charme arquitetônico do século XIX em um refúgio longe das multidões.
img_alt: A quiet, hidden cobblestone courtyard in Paris at golden hour. Sun rays filter through the leaves of ancient trees, illuminating intricate wrought-iron balconies and weathered limestone facades. The scene is intimate, away from the tourist crowds, evoking a sense of discovery and quiet luxury. The mood is romantic and peaceful, with warm, inviting natural light.

title: Etiqueta & Comportamento
img_alt: Close-up of a beautifully set dining table with fine porcelain, crystal glasses, and polished silverware reflecting warm light. A single, perfect white rose rests near a linen napkin. The setting implies a formal, elegant dinner in a high-end Parisian residence. The aesthetic is clean, luxurious, and detail-oriented. The lighting is soft, creating a sophisticated and welcoming atmosphere.
